revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-5-075

Alternative term: Watch circle radius

Radius of the drift circle (watch circle) of a vessel or buoy.


Note:

The term scope is applied to the length of mooring line of a vessel or buoy paid out (from tail chain to anchor or sinker). In shallow waters it may approximate to the drift circle radius.

{{IALAFooter}}
